wine_schools.name: AIS Sicilia - Associazione Italiana Sommelier
wine_schools.description: The official Sicilian regional body of Italy's Associazione Italiana Sommelier; three-level professional sommelier qualification courses run in Palermo, Catania, Messina, Agrigento, Taormina and Trapani delegations.
programs: Annual Best Sommelier of Sicily competition
wine_schools.tip: The Palermo and Catania delegations run the most frequent course starts; check aissicilia.com for current schedules.

wine_schools.name: WSET Courses Palermo - Enoteca La Nicchia
wine_schools.address: Via Principe di Belmonte 75/77, 90139 Palermo (PA), Sicily
wine_schools.description: Wine and Spirit Education Trust (WSET) Level 2 courses in English held at Enoteca La Nicchia; one of the only venues in Sicily offering internationally accredited WSET tuition.
wine_schools.tip: The WSET Level 2 in English is ideal for international visitors working in hospitality.

wine_schools.name: Anna Tasca Lanza Cooking and Wine School
wine_schools.address: Contrada Regaleali, Case Vecchie, 93010 Vallelunga Pratameno (CL), Sicily
wine_schools.description: Legendary farm-to-table culinary and wine school at Tasca d'Almerita's Regaleali estate; founded by Anna Tasca Lanza in 1989, now directed by daughter Fabrizia; immersive week-long programmes integrating winemaking, viticulture and Sicilian food culture.
programs: Week-long signature stays with cooking and wine immersion
Thematic Sicilian food and wine programmes
wine_schools.price_range: EUR 250 per day to EUR 2,500+ per week
wine_schools.tip: The harvest programme in October combines grape picking with winemaking workshops under Tasca d'Almerita winemakers.

verified.address_quoted: Contrada Regaleali, Case Vecchie, 93010 Vallelunga Pratameno CL, Sicily

wine_schools.name: Donnafugata Wine Garden Cooking School
wine_schools.description: Seasonal cooking school opened 2024 at Donnafugata's Pantelleria estate; morning classes on Tuesday, Thursday and Saturday pair vineyard walks with pasta-making and Sicilian recipes, concluding with a three-wine Zibibbo lunch.
programs: Pasta con i tenerumi and Sicilian cuisine classes
wine_schools.tip: Bookable via visit.donnafugata.it; open May-September only when the Pantelleria estate is running.

wine_schools.name: Baglio di Pianetto Wine Courses
wine_schools.address: Via Francia, Santa Cristina Gela, 90030 Palermo (PA), Sicily
wine_schools.description: Private introductory wine courses and tastings at the organic Baglio di Pianetto estate near Palermo; small groups with the estate winemaker covering Sicilian varietals, soil types and organic viticulture.
programs: Guided vertical tasting of estate wines
wine_schools.tip: Available year-round; best combined with the agriturismo stay for a full estate immersion.

verified.address_quoted: Via Francia, S. Cristina Gela - 90030 (PA) - Italy

wine_schools.name: La Foresteria Planeta Estate Wine Education
wine_schools.address: Contrada Passo di Gurra, SP 79, Km 91, 92013 Menfi (AG), Sicily
wine_schools.description: Wine education experiences at Planeta's La Foresteria resort covering the estate's five Sicilian terroirs; guided tastings, vineyard tours and olive oil education led by Planeta estate staff.
programs: Cooking classes with Chef Angelo Pumilia
wine_schools.tip: The five-terroir comparative tasting, covering Etna to Menfi to Vittoria, is unmatched for breadth on the island.

verified.address_quoted: Contrada Passo di Gurra, Ex S.S. 115 s.p. 79, Km 91 - 92013 Menfi (Ag)
